doc: smallest-config-search Option-C in-flight watch log. See spec docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-29-smallest-config-search-design.md §11.

justification: Watch wakeup #1 (T+~15min after launch) caught Modal call in failed state. Trainer subprocess exited 1 during model checkpoint resume — n_layers=6 model received an n_layers=8 state_dict. See cancelled-outcome row in rounds.jsonl for full root cause.

Watch wakeup #1 caught Modal call in failed state. Hydra preflight crashed — pyg_enzymes data config merged with base config left a leftover num_nodes=20 kwarg that GraphDataModule rejects. See cancelled-outcome row in rounds.jsonl.

Watch wakeup #1: Modal call still running (TimeoutError on .get(timeout=0)). W&B project tmgg-smallest-config-sweep does not exist yet (project will appear once trainer logs first metric); no gen-val data to apply the watcher flowchart. Default decision: keep, recheck in 15 min.

Watch wakeup #2 (T+~30min after launch). Modal call still running (FunctionCall.get(timeout=0) → TimeoutError = alive). Wandb-side flowchart could not run: api.wandb.ai is authenticated as igkgh-personal but the sweep writes to graph_denoise_team. Project lookup for tmgg-smallest-config-sweep returns Could not find project (auth, not absence — direct fetch of m1uwn3es also fails). Halting the autonomous watch loop until auth is sorted; SBM anchor will continue on Modal regardless.
